_README: Copy to AGENT_TASKS.json at the project root. Replace REPLACE_ME placeholders before committing. Status values are listed below for reference; remove the status_values array once you don't need it.
objective: REPLACE_ME with the current task objective.

tasks.title: Define the first concrete task slice
tasks.verification: Describe how completion will be verified.
tasks.notes: Keep tasks small, concrete, and independently checkable.
